description: 3. Add an IP address to an allow list: sigsci-whitelist-add-ip
examples:
Command Example
!sigsci-whitelist-add-ip ip=9.7.9.7 note=docdoc siteName=demisto
Context Example
{
"SigSciences.Corp.Site.Whitelist": {
"ExpiryDate": "",
"Note": "docdoc",
"Source": "9.7.9.7",
name: sigsci-whitelist-add-ip

outputs.description: The IP address on the allow list. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Whitelist.Note The note associated with the tag.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Whitelist.Source

outputs.description: The ID for this entry. SigSciences.Corp.Site.Whitelist.CreatedBy The user who added this source.
outputs.name: SigSciences.Corp.Site.Whitelist.ID
